generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data including crane state, sensor readings, and trajectory execution logs"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for system services"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaDataVisualizationService, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based) for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for message transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance PythonGantrylibModuleEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontrollerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Arcadia system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModuleEnabler
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance GrafanaDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for crane dynamics modeling"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory for movement planning"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data available for analysis and visualization"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state and sensor data"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for discrepancies between real-time measurements and simulations"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation results for crane behavior analysis"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CraneSensorDataTransmitted, CraneStateData, DockerEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaDashboardEnabler, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBrokerEnabler, PythonGantrylibModuleEnabler, ArduinoMicrocontrollerEnabler, AutodeskFusion360Enabler, CapellaEnabler, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, CADModel, KinematicModel, SimulationModel, OptimalTrajectoryInsight, DataLoggingInsight, DashboardVisualizationInsight, ValidationAlertInsight, SimulationInsight, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, ArduinoMicrocontroller, CraneFrame
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service and processed by Control Application, sent via Physical Crane Interface to motor controllers and electromagnet for physical movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization during crane operation with real-time data logging and simulation comparisons; specific time rates not documented but service operations occur in near real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized orchestration of physical crane components and digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) communicating via MQTT and shared database, deployed on a single personal computer using Docker for key services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily covers 'as operated' phase through continuous validation and monitoring during crane operation, with CAD models representing 'as designed' phase for simulation purposes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares measured trajectory execution with simulations, calculates distance metrics against predefined thresholds, and uses time series classification techniques for fault localization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for service-to-service communication; physical hardware interface protocols between crane and controller unspecified in documentation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer with Docker containerizing database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for remaining components."
]
